verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric or record is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative analysis across project types, sizes, or methods
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED BY: {source} performance metric is compared across projects grouped by {target} to establish norms and identify outliers
verbGlossary.INFLUENCED BY: {source} volume, frequency, or outcome is affected by {target} attribute without being solely determined by it
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} revision is initiated because {target} attribute creates conditions requiring design changes
verbGlossary.SHAPED BY: {source} format, content, or volume is determined by {target} delivery method's communication requirements
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} volume or metric scales proportionally with {target} (e.g., more subcontractors means more correspondence)
verbGlossary.DRIVEN BY: {source} is generated primarily because of {target} attribute's scope or constraint conditions
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} issuance and handling follows procedures determined by {target} type's terms and provisions
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} deliverable is mandated because {target} attribute specifies it as a contractual or certification requirement
verbGlossary.MULTIPLIED BY: {source} frequency increases proportionally when {target} applies (e.g., phased construction requires separate meetings per phase)
verbGlossary.TAILORED TO: {source} content is customized based on {target} specific requirements and hazard profile
verbGlossary.ROUTED BY: {source} review and approval path is determined by the target delivery method's organizational structure
verbGlossary.ACCELERATED BY: {source} revision pace increases because {target} compresses the design-construction overlap
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source} breadth and detail level is defined by {target} type's complexity requirements
verbGlossary.ISSUED DURING: {source} is issued within the procurement phase defined by {target} attribute
verbGlossary.STRUCTURED BY: {source} organization and agenda follow the communication patterns of the target delivery method
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source}record captures the state of work reflected by {target} completion attribute
verbGlossary.COMPLETED BY: {source} completion timeline is determined by {target} completion milestone attribute
verbGlossary.BOTTLENECKS: {source} process creates a dependency that slows {target} -- work cannot proceed until {source} is resolved, making it a critical path constraint
verbGlossary.SURFACES: {source} process reveals the existence of {target} by making missing or conflicting information visible through formal documentation
verbGlossary.UNBLOCKS: {source} response removes a constraint on {target} by providing the information or approval needed for work to proceed
verbGlossary.GATES: {source} process must complete before downstream work can begin, creating a mandatory checkpoint that affects {target}
verbGlossary.QUANTIFIES: {source} metric provides a numerical measure of {target} that can be tracked, benchmarked, and improved over time
